ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 2/4, 6/8, 10/12) */,
  "equiv_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size (e.g., S/M, M/L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., 'Women's Small') */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., 'Women's', 'Men's', 'Unisex') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bust_sizes" (
  "bust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bust measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the bust measurement belongs to */,
  "min_bust" TEXT /* Minimum bust measurement */,
  "max_bust" TEXT /* Maximum bust measurement */,
  "bust_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for bust (e.g., 'inches', 'cm') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bust_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waist_sizes" (
  "waist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waist measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the waist measurement belongs to */,
  "min_waist" TEXT /* Minimum waist measurement */,
  "max_waist" TEXT /* Maximum waist measurement */,
  "waist_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for waist (e.g., 'inches', 'cm') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waist_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_hip_sizes" (
  "low_hip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each low hip measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the low hip measurement belongs to */,
  "min_low_hip" TEXT /* Minimum low hip measurement */,
  "max_low_hip" TEXT /* Maximum low hip measurement */,
  "low_hip_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for low hip (e.g., 'inches', 'cm') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("low_hip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_hip_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "style_type" TEXT /* Type of style (e.g., 'Women's', 'Men's', 'Unisex') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "product_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., 'front', 'back', 'side') */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_warehouse" (
  "inventory_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory-warehouse entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock at the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the recommendation is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product recommended */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., 'based on past purchases') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_url" TEXT /* URL of the payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_type" TEXT /* Type of payment gateway (e.g., 'credit card', 'paypal') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment gateway used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'pending', 'processed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "shipping_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "shipping_provider_url" TEXT /* URL of the shipping provider */,
  "shipping_provider_type" TEXT /* Type of shipping provider (e.g., 'ground', 'air') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the shipment is for */,
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping provider used */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipping_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_provider_id") REFERENCES shipping_providers ("shipping_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'customer service') */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., 'sales', 'marketing') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., 'view orders', 'edit products') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the review is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the question is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who asked the question */,
  "question_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question the answer is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the answer */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was written */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES product_questions ("question_id")
)
